title: AN ACT RENAMING THE CARAMOAN PENINSULA ROAD IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR TO GOVERNOR FELIX A. FUENTEBELLA NATIONAL HIGHWAY

chunks.text:
H. No. 11834 / 97 OG No. 12, 56 Supp. (Mar. 19, 2001)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8968, October 04, 2000 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE CARAMOAN PENINSULA ROAD IN THE PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR TO GOVERNOR FELIX A. FUENTEBELLA NATIONAL HIGHWAY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Caramoan Peninsula road, a national road connecting and comprising the municipalities of Lagonoy, Presentacion, Garchitorena and Caramoan, all in the Province of Camarines Sur and bounded by the following road sections, to wit: (a) the 31.73 km. Lagonoy-Presentacion road; (b) the 18.65 km. Presentacion-Maligaya road; (c) the 31.748 km. Maligaya Junction-Caramoan-Guijalo road; and (d) the 12.075 km. Maligaya-Garchitorena road, is hereby renamed as the Governor Felix A. Fuentebella National Highway.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M.

DRILON

(Sgd.) MANUEL B. VILLAR JR.

President of the

Senate

Speaker of the House of

Representatives

This

Act

which

originated

in

the House of Representatives was finally passed

by the House of Representatives and the Senate on August 28, 2000

and October 2, 2000, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G.

YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P.

NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of

Representatives

Approved:

October 4,2000.

(Sgd.) JOSEPH E.

ESTRADA

President of the

Philippines
